compiled_state.title: [interface-contracts]: ticket create task in Task Setup uses bare command without -d -> task description may be empty
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
### 2. Incident Overview

* **Scenario Type:** Anti-Pattern Scan (follow-on from bug 027a-ad30)

#### Expected Behavior
When /dso:interface-contracts creates tasks in the Task Setup section, the ticket create task commands should include -d with the task body at creation time.

#### Actual Behavior
The Task Setup section (around line 122-130) shows bare ticket create task commands without -d. Key information is added via comment afterward. Same positional-bias risk as 027a-ad30.

#### Note
Lower severity than 027a-ad30 — interface-contract tasks are specialized dependency-wiring tasks (not full plan tasks), and the comment-based approach may be intentional for that use case. Needs review.

### 3. Technical Environment
* Skill: plugins/dso/skills/interface-contracts/SKILL.md
* Pattern: same bare ticket create task without -d as bug 027a-ad30
